mapper.sql: id, project_id, knowledge_base_id, file_id, title, source_type, index_status, task_id, error_message, version_no, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from knowledge_document where id = #{documentId} and deleted = 0

select from knowledge_document where knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} and deleted = 0
and index_status = #{indexStatus}
and title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by created_at desc, id desc
mapper.update: update knowledge_document set index_status = 'INDEXING', task_id = #{taskId}, error_message = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{documentId} and index_status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and deleted = 0
